content: Fix example errors: Add blockids.matrix_dataset method (or update example to use proper method)
Fix test failures: 12 tests failing (down from 20)
Fix import conflict: blocklens imported from both fmridataset and fmrihrf
Replace non-ASCII characters in R files with \uxxxx escapes
Add missing namespace imports: MASS, RcppParallel, bslib, future.apply, jsonlite, progress
Fix S3 method consistency issues in fmri_lm methods
Fix Rd documentation issues (undocumented arguments, incorrect usage entries)
Remove non-portable compilation flags from Makevars (-O3 -ffast-math -march=native)
Consider reducing package size (currently 27.4MB, mostly extdata)
